title: Amplitude Estimation
description: Quantum Amplitude Estimation (QAE) algorithm is used to estimate the probability amplitude of target components in a quantum state. It is a core component of quantum finance, quantum Monte Carlo simulation, and other applications.

params.help: The target probability p to estimate (0 <= p <= 1). We will construct a rotation gate to prepare the initial state with this success rate.
params.name: p
params.info: 请输入浮点数，范围在0到1之间（如 0.36）

params.help: The number of ancillary qubits used for estimation, which determines the estimation accuracy.
params.name: d
params.info: 请输入正整数，范围在1到10之间（如 6）
